scripts.dev:openclaw: node scripts/check-native-abi.cjs && npm run openclaw:ensure && npm run openclaw:patch && npm run openclaw:runtime:host && electron-vite dev
scripts.package:dir: npm run check:icons && electron-vite build && electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.json
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.openclaw:runtime:mac-arm64: npm run openclaw:ensure && npm run openclaw:patch && node scripts/run-build-openclaw-runtime.cjs --target=mac-arm64 && node scripts/sync-openclaw-runtime-current.cjs mac-arm64 && npm run openclaw:bundle && npm run openclaw:plugins && npm run openclaw:extensions && npm run openclaw:precompile && npm run openclaw:channel-deps && npm run openclaw:prune
scripts.openclaw:runtime:mac-x64: npm run openclaw:ensure && npm run openclaw:patch && node scripts/run-build-openclaw-runtime.cjs --target=mac-x64 && node scripts/sync-openclaw-runtime-current.cjs mac-x64 && npm run openclaw:bundle && npm run openclaw:plugins && npm run openclaw:extensions && npm run openclaw:precompile && npm run openclaw:channel-deps && npm run openclaw:prune
scripts.openclaw:runtime:win-x64: npm run openclaw:ensure && npm run openclaw:patch && node scripts/run-build-openclaw-runtime.cjs --target=win-x64 && node scripts/sync-openclaw-runtime-current.cjs win-x64 && npm run openclaw:bundle && npm run openclaw:plugins && npm run openclaw:extensions && npm run openclaw:precompile && npm run openclaw:channel-deps && npm run openclaw:prune
scripts.openclaw:runtime:win-arm64: npm run openclaw:ensure && npm run openclaw:patch && node scripts/run-build-openclaw-runtime.cjs --target=win-arm64 && node scripts/sync-openclaw-runtime-current.cjs win-arm64 && npm run openclaw:bundle && npm run openclaw:plugins && npm run openclaw:extensions && npm run openclaw:precompile && npm run openclaw:channel-deps && npm run openclaw:prune
scripts.openclaw:runtime:linux-x64: npm run openclaw:ensure && npm run openclaw:patch && node scripts/run-build-openclaw-runtime.cjs --target=linux-x64 && node scripts/sync-openclaw-runtime-current.cjs linux-x64 && npm run openclaw:bundle && npm run openclaw:plugins && npm run openclaw:extensions && npm run openclaw:precompile && npm run openclaw:channel-deps && npm run openclaw:prune
scripts.openclaw:runtime:linux-arm64: npm run openclaw:ensure && npm run openclaw:patch && node scripts/run-build-openclaw-runtime.cjs --target=linux-arm64 && node scripts/sync-openclaw-runtime-current.cjs linux-arm64 && npm run openclaw:bundle && npm run openclaw:plugins && npm run openclaw:extensions && npm run openclaw:precompile && npm run openclaw:channel-deps && npm run openclaw:prune
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run check:icons && electron-vite build && npm run openclaw:runtime:mac-arm64 && npm run openclaw:finalize && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config electron-builder.json
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run check:icons && electron-vite build && npm run openclaw:runtime:mac-x64 && npm run openclaw:finalize && electron-builder --mac --x64 --config electron-builder.json
scripts.dist:win:x64: npm run check:icons && electron-vite build && npm run openclaw:runtime:win-x64 && npm run openclaw:finalize && electron-builder --win --x64 --config electron-builder.json
